rule_metadata.name: snmpwalk
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'snmpwalk' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule snmpwalk
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'snmpwalk' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "snmpwalk"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = "snmpwalk  -v1 -cpublic "
		$string2 = /snmpwalk\s.{0,1000}\spublic\s.{0,1000}1\.3\.6\.1\./ nocase ascii wide
		$string3 = "snmpwalk -c public -v1 "

	condition:
		any of them
}
